  "findings": [
    "Missing pipe guides near expansion loops",
    "Risk of pipe buckling, misalignment, and excessive stress on joints during thermal expansion"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install properly spaced alignment guides on both sides of the expansion loops in accordance with MSS SP-58 and project standards",
    "Inspect the piping and joints for signs of stress, deformation, or leakage caused by the lack of guidance"
  ],
  "rationale": "Expansion loops require alignment guides on the piping leading into the loop to ensure the thermal expansion is directed axially into the loop rather than causing lateral buckling or twisting. The absence of these guides is a critical installation defect that can lead to catastrophic piping failure under thermal load.",
  "references": [
    "MSS SP-58",
    "Project support standards"
  ]
}
